levels.name: Unverified
levels.definition: Location is a raw caller claim, ANI/ALI seed, or freeform text with no dispatcher verification action. Zone may be guessed only as a vague blob.
levels.howPlayerAchieves: Initial CFS state before VerifyLocation; or after clearing verification without confirm.

levels.name: Partial
levels.definition: Block, cross-street, landmark, or zone refined but not a confirmed premise pin. Player has taken a verify action that narrowed uncertainty without full confirmation.
levels.howPlayerAchieves: VerifyLocation with partial result; CT inject partial address; cross-street only confirm.

levels.name: Verified
levels.definition: Dispatcher confirmed a stated location suitable for response (premise, verified address, or confirmed intersection). Verified does not reveal hidden IncidentTruth; wrong verification vs truth grades FAIL_WRONG_LOCATION.
levels.howPlayerAchieves: VerifyLocation success against knowable address set; structured confirm of freeform + zone.

levels.name: Conflicting
levels.definition: Two or more knowable location claims disagree (caller vs ALI, two callers, unit size-up vs CFS). High-acuity dispatch blocked until resolved or consciously overridden with doctrine path Phase 0 = blocked.
levels.howPlayerAchieves: Conflicting injects; second VerifyLocation disagreeing; CT note conflicts with field.
